violations.description: Thawing potentially hazardous food. — --Potentially hazardous food, Beef was not thawed in an approved manner. - Thaw under running water, under refrigeration, or as part of cooking process. - Use sanitize sink for any food prep as has air gap to drain.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. - Items found throughout with out dates.
Sanitizing solution testing devices. — --Test strip or kit that accurately measures the sanitizing concentration was not provided. - Need for use of bleach.
Plumbing system. — --Plumbing system was not designed, constructed, operated and/or maintained according to regulation. - Walk-in cooler condensate line empties inside into an uncovered bucket.
Toilet facilities. — --Toilet room was not provided with a tight fitting or self closing door.
Employee dressing areas and lockers. — --- Employee food found amongst restaurant foods.
